creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244225
notification buttons – None | All | Status

> Edit this page

- appears in documentation at docs.freebsd.org – for example, 
  <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/overview/>

> … we value your contributions very highly. …

The resulting workflow (three buttons, a norm for users of GitHub): 

1. Commit changes…

2. Propose changes

3. Create pull request

Where people oversubscribe – and then, are either unaware (or wilfully ignorant) of None and Status buttons: 

- contributions may be perceptibly less than valuable. 

Please fix the primer. 

At least: be honest about what contributors should expect.

Thanks

----

In the meantime, there remain seven PRs at <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pulls>: 

- some of which might please subscribers, in the context of  
  <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/book/#weblate-become-translator> 
  point 6

    "… The Documentation project is also accepting GitHub 
     Pull Requests with translation submissions."

- others might cause displeasure, and be subject to moves 
  away from the FreeBSD repo, to forks.
